events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked to provide a JSON output about an EMT bending & installation scenario. The condition is "unreamed cut ends" at the rough-complete stage. We must identify component/condition, defect cues, and decide pass/fail, risk, etc. Trade: Electrical. Code references: NEC Art. 358, Ch. 9 (fill). Unreamed cut ends are a defect because sharp edges can damage conductor insulation. NEC 358.28 requires reaming to remove burrs and rough edges. So this is a non-compliant installed condition. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (potential for insulation damage, but not yet energized maybe). Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"]. Percent complete: 80? But it's rough-complete, so maybe 75-80% (since finishing touches like reaming are needed). I'll guess 80. Value: no numeric reading needed. Sound, event_time, rate, order: not applicable. Workable: not asked for activities. Findings: "Unreamed cut ends on EMT can damage conductor insulation." Actions: "Ream all cut ends to remove burrs and rough edges before pulling conductors." Rationale: "NEC 358.28 requires reaming to protect conductors from abrasion." References: ["NEC 358.28"]. Confidence: 0.95.

Output JSON.
